boundary_notes: Review records are export candidates, not durable state.
Source refs are lineage pointers, not proof.
Candidate bundles are not facts.
Promotion decisions are required before state apply.
Formation Receipts are required before state apply.
Imports do not apply durable Perspective state.
Trajectory events remain public-safe summaries.
Feedback is review context, not truth.
Layout preferences are candidates for future preview.
Dogfooding records remain review candidates.
Runtime audit events are not proof/evidence writes.
Retrieval index metadata is derived and does not execute retrieval.
Provider-assisted extraction outputs are candidates only.
Git Ledger refs are future/deferred refs only.
Product-write remains parked by #686.
This is a candidate export manifest only.
Privacy Redaction Runtime Guard v0.1 is required before future export runtime.
Smoke/CI pass is not truth.

validation_findings.public_safe_summary: Durable Perspective state import is preview-only in this policy slice.

boundary_notes: Imports are preview/validate only unless a future explicit operator-gated runtime slice is approved.

blocked_raw_private_example.public_safe_summary: Blocked fixture markers represent private/raw payload classes without including real private data.

blocked_auto_action_example.public_safe_summary: Import policy blocks automatic privileged runtime actions.

product_write_parked_example.public_safe_summary: Product-write remains parked by #686 and is denied by this policy.
